case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. BARBARA ANNE MCBRIDE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, BARBARA ANNE $710.41 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $825.41, LOAN PRINCIPAL (600) LESS PAYMENTS (56); ACCRUED INTEREST ADJUSTED TO LEGAL RATE (77.67) LESS PAYMENTS (25.83); LATE FEES (126) LESS 0. =721.84 BUT COMPLAINT SOUGHT 710.41. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2018 BY PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BARBARA ANNE MCBRIDE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED NOV-29-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, BARBARA ANNE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $710.41 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, BARBARA ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE, BARBARA ANNE
